content: Ultimate Vault Hunter Upgrade Pack Two: Digistruct Peak Challenge
name: Legendary Roboteer
description: Legendary Roboteer is a Legendary (orange) class mod for Gaige the Mechromancer, made by Hyperion. It is part of the Ultimate Vault Hunter Upgrade Pack 2: Digistruct Peak Challenge. It can drop from Tubby enemies at level 62+ in Ultimate Vault Hunter Mode.
notes: Low level versions (below level 50) may show reduced skill bonuses, but these cannot be obtained legitimately. This class mod requires the Digistruct Peak upgrade pack and is not available without that DLC.

special.description: At max level it provides +31% action skill cooldown rate and +51% melee damage. It uses the standard Roboteer skin, which helps distinguish it visually.
special.title: "Science, my sweetest valentine!"
